products.name: Alpine down parka
products.description: Heavyweight 800-fill goose down parka with storm hood, snow skirt, and four cargo pockets. Rated for sub-zero alpine touring.

products.name: Featherline puffer jacket
products.description: Packable synthetic-fill puffer jacket. Water-repellent shell, baffle construction, stuffs into its own pocket.

products.name: Cascade rain shell
products.description: Three-layer waterproof breathable rain jacket with taped seams, helmet-compatible hood, and pit zips.

products.name: Hearthside wool overcoat
products.description: Tailored 70% wool overcoat in charcoal, single-breasted with notch lapels. Mid-thigh length for commuting.

products.name: Trailhead softshell
products.description: Stretch softshell jacket with brushed-back fleece lining for cool-weather hiking and trail running.

products.name: Drifter denim trucker
products.description: Classic denim trucker jacket in indigo selvedge with copper rivets and pearl snaps.

products.name: Featherline vest
products.description: Lightweight sleeveless puffer vest for layering. Same baffle build as the jacket without the sleeves.

products.name: Summit hiking boot
products.description: Mid-cut waterproof hiking boot with Vibram outsole, gusseted tongue, and full-grain leather upper.

products.name: Switchback trail runner
products.description: Lightweight trail running shoe with rock plate, aggressive lug pattern, and quick-dry mesh upper.

products.name: Plaza city sneaker
products.description: Minimalist leather sneaker on a cup sole. Unlined for warm-weather everyday wear.

products.name: Riverbed sandal
products.description: Quick-dry sport sandal with cushioned EVA midsole and adjustable webbing straps for water hiking.

products.name: Drifter chukka
products.description: Suede chukka boot on a crepe sole. Two-eyelet lacing, unstructured toe, soft for daily wear.

products.name: Glacier insulated snow boot
products.description: Knee-high insulated winter boot with removable felt liner and ice-grip outsole. Rated to -30 C.

products.name: Heritage flannel shirt
products.description: Brushed cotton flannel shirt in red plaid. Curved hem, two chest pockets, soft on the skin.

products.name: Merino base layer crew
products.description: 200 gsm merino wool long-sleeve base layer. Flat-lock seams, naturally odour-resistant.

products.name: Studio cashmere sweater
products.description: Two-ply cashmere crewneck sweater in oatmeal. Ribbed hem and cuffs, slim through the body.

products.name: Daybreak organic tee
products.description: Heavy-weight 240 gsm organic cotton t-shirt with reinforced collar and side seams.

products.name: Trailhead grid fleece
products.description: Grid-pattern fleece pullover with chest pocket and thumb loops. Layers under a shell.

products.name: Switchback technical tee
products.description: Recycled-polyester running tee with mesh side panels and a reflective logo for low-light visibility.

products.name: Heritage wool henley
products.description: Mid-weight merino henley with a three-button placket. Mid-grey marl, ribbed cuffs.

products.name: Workhorse straight jean
products.description: 14 oz selvedge denim in a straight cut. Rigid out of the box, breaks in with wear.

products.name: Cascade hiking pant
products.description: Stretch nylon hiking pant with articulated knees, water-repellent finish, and zipped thigh pocket.

products.name: Studio merino trouser
products.description: Tailored wool-blend trouser with a slight stretch. Hidden side adjusters, no-break hem.

products.name: Trailhead jogger
products.description: Mid-weight French terry jogger with elastic cuffs and zipped side pockets.

products.name: Switchback running short
products.description: Five-inch running short with built-in liner, two side pockets, and a zipped back pocket.

products.name: Summit merino beanie
products.description: Double-layer merino beanie. Fold-up cuff, naturally odour-resistant, packs flat.

products.name: Cascade waterproof cap
products.description: Waterproof breathable cap with a stiff brim and rear cinch. Pairs with the Cascade rain shell.

products.name: Hearthside cashmere scarf
products.description: Long two-ply cashmere scarf in herringbone weave. Generous drape, fringed ends.

products.name: Workhorse leather belt
products.description: Full-grain bridle leather belt with a solid brass single-prong buckle. Sized in half-inches.

products.name: Glacier insulated mitten
products.description: Goretex shell over Primaloft insulation with a leather palm and removable wool liner.

products.name: Trailhead trucker cap
products.description: Five-panel mesh-back trucker cap with a curved brim and embroidered patch.

products.name: Summit alpine pack 35
products.description: 35-litre alpine climbing pack with rope strap, removable hipbelt, and dual ice-tool loops.

products.name: Cascade daypack 22
products.description: 22-litre daypack with a hydration sleeve, padded laptop pocket, and ventilated mesh back panel.

products.name: Studio leather briefcase
products.description: Full-grain leather briefcase with a padded 15-inch laptop sleeve, two main compartments, and brass hardware.

products.name: Workhorse canvas tote
products.description: 20 oz waxed canvas tote with leather handles and brass rivets. Develops a patina with use.

products.name: Glacier expedition duffel
products.description: 90-litre haul duffel in burly TPU-coated fabric with lockable zippers and removable backpack straps.

products.name: Switchback running vest
products.description: 10-litre running vest with soft flask pockets in the chest and a stretch back pocket for shells.
